column.text:
• Brewers placed LHP Rob Zastryzny on the 15-day injured list with a left trapezius strain.
• Blue Jays transferred LHP Joe Mantiply to the 60-day injured list with left knee inflammation.
• Reds activated RF Noelvi Marte from the injured list.
• Padres designated RF Nick Castellanos for assignment.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
x_article.body:
• Brewers placed LHP Rob Zastryzny on the 15-day injured list with a left trapezius strain.
• Blue Jays transferred LHP Joe Mantiply to the 60-day injured list with left knee inflammation.
• Reds activated RF Noelvi Marte from the injured list.
• Padres designated RF Nick Castellanos for assignment.
• New York Mets recalled RHP Joey Gerber from Syracuse.
• Angels traded C Austin Wynns to the Braves for cash considerations.
• Twins traded RHP Simeon Woods Richardson to the Blue Jays for cash.
• Houston Astros sent RHP Cristian Javier on a rehab assignment to Corpus Christi.
